reason: SSOT behavior is not concrete enough for production RTL implementation.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field/expression name 'ex_wb_ready' to a DUT input port.
questions.evidence: Rule expressions reference 'ex_wb_ready', but rtl_contract.input_map does not bind it to an input port.
questions.recommended_default: Use explicit input_map entries for every transaction field used by output_rules/sample_condition.
questions.downstream_effect: Generated RTL can connect the SSOT transaction vocabulary to concrete DUT pins.

questions.decision_needed: Rewrite output rule 'retire_pulse' using the supported expression DSL.
options: Use integer, field names, +, -, *, /, %, <<, >>, &, |, ^, comparisons, and Python-style and/or/not.
questions.recommended_default: Keep output_rules machine-checkable and free of prose.
questions.downstream_effect: The same expression can be evaluated by the FL model and lowered to RTL.

questions.decision_needed: Lock or explicitly waive production RTL target scale before PL330-level PASS claims.
options: Review the reference-derived suggested_ssot_target_scale and copy approved positive minima into quality_gates.rtl_gen.target_scale.
Provide edited human-approved target_scale minima calibrated from architecture review.
If this IP intentionally does not enforce reference scale, set quality_gates.rtl_gen.target_scale_waiver.approved=true with a reason.
questions.recommended_default: Treat suggested_ssot_target_scale as a review candidate only; lock it in SSOT target_scale only after human architecture approval.

current_target_scale.policy: SSOT-locked scale target. It may be calibrated from a reference profile, but rtl-gen must satisfy it through IP-specific SSOT behavior, not by copying reference RTL.

target_scale_example.basis: Human-approved architecture review calibrated from rtl_reference_profile.json.

waiver_example.reason: architecture review intentionally targets a smaller implementation

answer_schema.rule: Do not lock a reference-derived candidate without human review; do not copy reference RTL.

next_action: Run workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/prepare_rtl_human_review.py to create a pending review packet, answer/approve through ATLAS UI or resolve_rtl_blockers.py, update SSOT, then rerun /ssot-rtl.
